title: thymus fallax var. pubescens
intro: Thymus fallax var. pubescens, commonly known as the pubescent thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus fallax var. pubescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Thymus fallax var. pubescens can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
